prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约4983→5104→3934→3729→3671，近3年持续前移（位次数字减小），2023年较2022年大幅跃升约1170名，2024–2025年继续小幅前移约58名；2025年基准约3671名，为近5年最高水平；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2023年均为754人，2024年降至736人，2025年进一步降至706人；2026年计划753人，较2025年扩招约47人（+6.7%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第23名，近年排名稳定在21–25区间，属全国顶尖工科院校；2024年声誉偏负面（遭受境外网络攻击事件），2026年声誉仍偏负面（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打、校方被指偏袒不作为）；抖音热度一般（总排名第74），短视频平台曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，在航空航天、计算机、材料等领域具有全国顶尖实力，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等西工大王牌专业大类均为高热推荐，报考热度持续升温；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），竞争显著加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，为本省985高校，本省招生占比历来较高（2025年物理类计划706人占全国总招生比例可观），本地考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近3年位次持续前移趋势、2026年扩招约6.7%的缓解作用、本省物理类考生大幅增加19.7%带来的竞争加剧、王牌专业热度持续升温等因素，在2025年基准3671名基础上预计竞争略有加剧但扩招部分对冲；预测最低位次约3848名，区间3348–4348名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 4983 → 5104 → 3934 → 3729 → 3671, with a continuous forward shift (decreasing ranking number) in the last 3 years. In 2023, there was a significant leap of about 1170 places compared to 2022, and in 2024–2025, a slight forward shift of about 58 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3671, the highest level in the last 5 years. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 754 from 2021 to 2023, decreased to 736 in 2024, and further decreased to 706 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 753, an increase of about 47 students (+6.7%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 23rd, with stable rankings in the 21–25 range in recent years, making it a top national engineering institution. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a cyber attack incident), and in 2026, its reputation remains somewhat negative (students assaulted by local criminal elements, with the school accused of bias and inaction). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 74th), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. It has A+ disciplines in Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering, A in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 7 disciplines at A- or above. It has top national strength in aerospace, computer science, and materials, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, and other flagship majors at Northwestern Polytechnical University are all highly recommended, with increasing application heat. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and as a provincial 985 university, its local enrollment proportion has historically been high (in 2025, the physics category plan of 706 students accounts for a considerable share of total national enrollment), leading to strong willingness among local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward shift in rankings over the past 3 years, the mitigating effect of a 6.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees, and the rising popularity of flagship majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify but is partially offset by the expansion. Based on the 2025 baseline of 3671, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3848, with a range of 3348–4348.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3348–4348, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship classes (Feitian Class, Top-Notch Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Northwestern Polytechnical University has dual core strengths in aerospace and computer science, with outstanding A+ disciplines. Candidates can reasonably combine majors based on personal interests and ranking.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第23名，属全国顶尖高校；2024–2026年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度一般；未见投档断档记录；西工大以工科见长，文科招生专业较少（经济与贸易类、工商管理类、外国语言文学类、马克思主义理论），无直接对应的A类学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科相关专业大类（金融/财经/经济分化观望、外语一般观望、法学分化观望）热度中等偏分化；本省2026年历史类考生约88500人，较2025年75641人增加约12859人（+17.0%），竞争加剧；西北工业大学位于本省西安市，为本省985高校，文科招生规模较小但本地考生认可度高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动无明显趋势、2026年大幅缩招21.3%带来的竞争加剧、本省历史类考生增加17.0%等因素，在2025年基准1213名基础上预计竞争加剧；预测最低位次约1078名，区间916–1240名。

- 工商管理类（管理试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 西工大文科招生专业仅4个，规模较小。位次在预测区间916–1240名内，建议以经济与贸易类为主攻方向，工商管理类可作冲刺，外国语言文学类为稳妥保底。马克思主义理论因选科要求（首选历史再选思想政治）需注意匹配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1142 → 1265 → 1248 → 1165 → 1213, fluctuating within the 1140–1270 range with no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 1213th place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 26 in 2021, 29 in 2022–2023, and 47 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 37, a reduction of 10 students (-21.3%) compared to 2025, a significant contraction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 23rd in the Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top universities nationwide; from 2024 to 2026, reputation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity is average; no records of admission cut-off drops; NPU is strong in engineering, with few liberal arts majors (Economics and Trade, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Marxist Theory), and no directly corresponding A-class disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts-related major categories (Finance/Economics differentiation wait-and-see, Foreign Languages average wait-and-see, Law differentiation wait-and-see) have moderate popularity with differentiation; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of approximately 12,859 (+17.0%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; NPU is located in Xi'an, the provincial capital, and is a provincial 985 university with a small liberal arts enrollment scale but high recognition among local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the lack of a clear trend in historical ranking fluctuations, intensified competition due to a significant 21.3% enrollment reduction in 2026, and a 17.0% increase in provincial history category examinees, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1213th place; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1078th, with a range of 916–1240th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Marxist Theory
- Business Administration (Management Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics and Trade (International Trade, Law, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: NPU offers only 4 liberal arts majors with a small scale. For rankings within the predicted range of 916–1240, it is recommended to focus on Economics and Trade as the main direction, Business Administration as a reach, and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safe backup. Marxist Theory requires attention to subject selection requirements (first choice history, second choice ideological and political).
